titleStmt.title: SII 16.17: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 17. (A.R. No. 320 of 1922.) TAṀBAḶḶAPALLE, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Mallikārjuna temple on the Mallayyakoṇḍa to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1327, Pārthiva, Āshāḍha śu. 1, Sunday, corresponding to 1405 A.D., June 27. The weekday, however, was Saturday.

It records that on the representation and production of documentary evidence of the temple priests, the king confirmed the grant of the village Taṁmaḍiyahaḷi and the income of 25 honnu from the kāṇika derived from the Śivarātri festivals and was being paid till then to the palace, for the amṛitapaḍi service of the god as in vogue in the days of Kaṁpaṁṇoḍeya, Bukaṁṇoḍeya and Chikoḍeya, by order to Mayilappa. Also records the apportioning of the shares among the priests of the temple from the commencement of Śivarātri. The order seems to be issued to take effect from Kārtika śu. 1 in Tāraṇa corresponding to 1404 A.D., October 5, as in No. 18 below.
In this record the former portion of the grant is in Kannaḍa and the latter detailing the apportionment of the shares among the priests, in Telugu as in No. 18 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakava
ruṣaṁbulu 1327 Agunēṭi pā¨rttiva sa
ṁvatsara Āṣāḍa śu 1 bhā śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara harirāyavibhāḷa bāśaka
tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rvvapaścimadakṣi
ṇōttaracatuḥsamudrādhipati rājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra dēvarāyama
hārāyaḍu mayilappage nirūpa mā
¨rjavāḍayanāḍa vōḷage yiha caṁdragiri
ya mallikā¨rjuna dēvarige Anādi pū
¨rvvadali baṁdu bahadaṁtā taṁmaḍiya
haḷiya yaṁbapuravanū sivarātri mō
dalāgi bahadaṁtā kāṇikevanū
Ā dēvarige Amrutapaḍige sa¨rvvamānya
vāgi caṁdu baralāgi yiga pū¨rvvamareyā
deyaṁte Ānāḍi Adhikārigaḷanū sivarātri
kāṇike Aramanege bahadeṁdu Ā dēvarapū
jārigaḷu Ārubāgiya pūjārigaḷanū ka
risi varuṣake varahāṇa yipattaAyidu ho
ṁnnanū koḷutta baharu kaṁḍāpū¨rvvadalu
kaṁpaṁṇayōḍeyaru bukaṁṇayōḍa
yaru cikoḍayarakāla toḍagevu Ā dēva
rakāṇike Ā dēvarige caṁdu bahudeṁdu
Ārubāgiya stānikaruṁ taṁmakayyasaṁ
dhānagaḷanū tōṟi biṁnahava māḍidake
nāvu Ā mareyāde Ellā naḍasibahudeṁ
du nirūpavu koṭevāgi muṁdake tāraṇa saṁ
vatsara kā¨rttika su 1 Ārabhyavāgi Ā sivarātri
kāṇike Ā yippattaAyidu varahaṇa hoṁna
[naiIvēdyakāgi] Aramanege Ettalāgadu Adhikāriga
ḷigehēḷikaḷihi Ājñeyavanū māḍuvudu Ā mali
kā¨rjunadēvara puravanū kāṇikeyavanū
pū¨rvvamariyāde tappadeĀṁge kaṁpaṁṇa
voḍeyaru bukkaṁṇavoḍayaru cikkoḍaya
rakāla mōdalāgivu hiṁde naḍadubaṁda mari
yāde yelā Aṣṭabhōgatējesvāṁmyesa
hita Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāhihāgi Adhikārasu
ṁkigataḷavāraru Āru vōgadāṁge kaṭaḷeya
nu māḍi sa¨rvvamānyavāgi naḍasibahadu yeṁdu
rāyasa¨rdama¨ryyādeya Ā caṁdragiriya ma
likā¨rjunadēvarige pū¨rvvadalu saluvaṁtā vū
rigevū kāṇikegavū Aṣṭabhōgatējesvāmya
vu sahitavāgi kallugaḷa sāsānavanū naḍi
sikoṁbudu yi caṁdragiri mallikā¨rjuna dē
vara stānāpatulu pedamallajiyyala bayira
jiyyala koḍuku cānajiyyala vīriki cele
Ārokapāluṁnu malajiyyalaku Oka pā
luṁnu cānajiyyalaku mūḍu vāḍlalekanu
Anubhaviṁturu nāgajiyyala bayyana tana
malajiyyala koḍukulu koṁḍajiyyala cādu
jiyyala cellajiyyala vīraciṁna jiyya
la vīriki cele Āroka pāluṁnu koṁḍaji
yyalu Ātani taṁmulu naluvuru tama
sakamuṁnu callajiyyala Ātanilōni vāriki
sakamuṁnu sarigānu Anubaviṁturu
mallajiyyala cānajiyyala
jiyyala sādaṁ bayarajiyyala
jiyyala vīru tamaku cele Ārokapāluṁ
jiyyalaku Okapāluṁnu malajiyya
ṁnu mūḍu vāḍlanu
tamaḍla leka nanubhaviṁturu .
Digital edition of SII 16.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
